======= RMA00361Cornell University reunion miscellany41-4-361Compiled by Maria A. KeatingDivision of Rare and Manuscript Collections
May 26, 20042B Carl A. Kroch LibraryCornell UniversityIthaca, NY 14853rareref@cornell.eduURL: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on 2022-09-19 18:47:25 UTC.12/07/2018
This resource was modified by the ArchivesSpace Preprocessor developed by the Harvard Library (https://github.com/harvard-library/archivesspace-preprocessor)2007-05-29
converted from EAD 1.0 to EAD 2002 >>>>>>> 2e3ec5c57314077b8435567632a49d313357daab
English
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections
Cornell University reunion miscellany 41-4-361
3.5 cubic feet. 3.5 cubic feet.
1871-2010. Pamphlets, Newsletters, Newspaper articles, Photographs, Programs, Class directories, Broadsides. Primarily programs and pamphlets relating to reunion activities of various Cornell classes. Collection material in English 2084423
General
Contact Information:
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524 rareref@cornell.edu http://rmc.library.cornell.edu
Compiled by:
Maria A. Keating
Date completed:
May 26, 2004
EAD encoding:
Maria A. Keating, May 26, 2004
Date modified:
RMC Staff, February 2016
COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
Primarily programs and pamphlets relating to reunion activities of various Cornell classes. Also included are broadsides, programs, class directories, photographs, newsletters, correspondence, clippings, and other materials related to many classes and reunions.
Cite As:
Cornell University reunion miscellany, #41-4-361. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.
Pamphlets. Photographs. Universities and colleges -- Alumni and alumnae. Cornell University -- : Alumni and alumnae.
